REVOKE admin_role FROM security_object2 WHERE security_object2 hasRole admin_role;
SELECT * FROM security_object1 WHERE hasRole ADMIN_ROLE;
SELECT security_object1.hasRole FROM security_object1 JOIN security_object2 ON security_object1.id = security_object2.id WHERE security_object1.hasRole != user_role;
REVOKE (SELECT role FROM Role WHERE role.name = 'user_role') FROM security_object1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM security_object1 WHERE hasRole != admin_role AND hasRole != user_role;
DELETE FROM Role WHERE name = 'user_role' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM security_object1 WHERE hasRole = 'user_role');
